productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Ultimatum Max Black Backpacks
description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this tough black nike Ultimatum Max Air Utility backpack. Carry it to college, office or on a casual day out with your friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it will accomodate everything you can think of, while you strut around looking super cool! Measurement Height: 51 cm Width: 43 cm Depth: 17 cm Capacity: 33 litres Made of 32% polyester and 68% nylon for enhanced durability and style Nylon lining for increased durability Two main zippered compartments to accomodate all your useful items One compartment with a separate laptop enclosure Second compartment with small pouches and a small zippered pocket for storing essentials Mesh slip pocket at front with secure clip Two zippered Insulated cooler pockets at the front Ventilated shoe or wet/dry storage zippered compartment at the base Mesh pockets on sides to hold bottles Exterior media-player zip pocket at left top to keep your player secure and protected Adjustable shoulders straps with lightweight yet durable nike Max Air technology to absorb shock and cushion the shoulder, distributing loads more evenly Ventilated and molded back panel for breathability and comfort Water resistant tarpaulin bottom Haul loop for handling ease Branding on straps Nike Swoosh on the front Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
